name: ClawKit for Lovable
description: Helps OpenClaw build, verify, refactor, and ship Lovable.dev projects while keeping GitHub, tests, code edits, and delivery under OpenClaw control.

defaultGithubOwner.label: Default GitHub owner
defaultGithubOwner.help: Optional owner or organization OpenClaw should prefer when creating repositories.

requireApprovalForLaunch.label: Require approval before launching Lovable
requireApprovalForLaunch.help: Recommended for shared or production machines.
